description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Flatpak Qt6 that triggers on push events with tags matching v* and on workflow dispatch. Use a single ubuntu-24.04 job running in a privileged container with a kde-6.8 image. Check out the repository, build a flatpak package using the flatpak-builder action with a specific manifest and architecture, rename the resulting flatpak file, and create a draft GitHub release with the renamed file if the workflow is triggered by a tag push.
